issue_body_preview:
The following code demonstrates a few issues I experienced with the click event.

First, the click event fires for all mouse buttons, which was surprising, I would expect the click event to fire just for the left mouse button.

Second, the button attribute is not set on the click event so I can'
test_description_zh: 在页面上绑定 click 事件的元素上，分别使用鼠标左键、中键和右键进行点击操作，观察 click 事件的触发情况以及事件对象中 button 属性的值。
expected_result_zh: click 事件仅在鼠标左键点击时触发，不会因中键或右键点击而触发；同时 click 事件对象中应正确包含 button 属性，标识所按下的鼠标按钮。
